body.content: Verified Faction of the Week: Delta-0 "Livid Night"

**Delta-0 "Livid Night"** is a specialised Mobile Task Force that creates **physical and informational __"blackouts"__** during *critical incidents* to establish a secured zone and support further operations called the "Nocturne Zone" (NZ). With a tactical and unique full Operational Procedure, along with physical lockdowns with information suppression methods, Delta-0 strikes a balance to best achieve the most favourable outcome.
In the near future, one can expect new **discord events**, new **official logos**, new **morphs**, and other initiatives that would enhance __***your***__ experience in the faction!

We're hoping to expand our outreach on SCP:RP with the addition of us joining a new site. It feels important to us as a faction to have sites dedicated to roleplay especially due to our purpose, and we are very happy to have been accepted to Area-14. Hopefully we can form some new alliances/partnerships, expand our roleplay capabilities with our Nocturne Zones, find new opportunities, and benefit both Area-14 and ourselves with our presence on-site. There will be much more to say in the future about this specific topic, but everyone has been looking forward to deploying and we will have HC led deployments in the upcoming days.
